summary: The diff implements REQ-4 fully. A 'Subjects' section has been added to App.tsx with six 10th-grade science subjects (Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Mathematics, English, Social Studies), each displayed as a styled card with an icon, name, and description. The section uses the academy's red (#d9002c) accent color via the existing design token system, is centered and responsive using a grid layout, and appears below the hero/welcome section. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.
